name: finch-todolist
description: A simple personal task list for Finch.

finch.name: Todo List
finch.description: Keep track of todos, current tasks, and completed items in one place.
finch.systemPrompt: When the user wants to add, view, start, complete, or delete personal tasks, use the Todo List tools. Tasks are shared globally across conversations and Spaces, and completed items remain archived.

promptGuides.title: Add a todo
promptGuides.description: Save a new task to your personal list

promptGuides.title: Show todos
promptGuides.description: View todo, in-progress, and completed tasks
promptGuides.prompt: Show all my tasks, including completed archives
